description: Letter from Asad to Yoel. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely ca. 13th century. Asking him relay a message and greetings to ‘the wonderful and exceedingly wise judge’ with many Hebrew citations. Long and calligraphic, with many biblical quotations and expressions of longing for the addressee. The letter mentions Yoel ha-Melammed (cf. T-S 20.148 and Moss. II,121.1) and his wife, probably a cousin, which would explain the identity of the names. (Information in part from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מאסד ליואל. בעברית וביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: ייתכן המאה ה-13. מבקש להעביר מסר וברכות ל'שופט הנפלא והחכם מאוד' עם ציטוטים עבריים רבים. ארוך וקליגרפי, מביע געגועים לנמען.
